rules.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-medium tracking-tighter leading-none text-white
rules.h2: text-3xl md:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-medium tracking-tight text-white

surfaces.glass_button: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/15 transition-all duration-300 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,255,255,0.05)] hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(255,255,255,0.1)]

sections_instructions.hero: Fullscreen height (100vh). Use absolute positioned video with object-cover. Overlay with bg-black/50 for text contrast. Central alignment. H1 extremely large, fluid typography. Glass CTA with hover glow.
sections_instructions.before_after_slider: Interactive slider component. Use framer-motion or a custom React state with clip-path to reveal 'after' image over 'before' image. Add a vertical dragger line in pure white.
sections_instructions.services_cards: Bento grid layout. Cards use the 'glass_panel' surface. Images should be grayscale and gain slight contrast on hover. Include slow zoom-in on image hover.
sections_instructions.configurator: Control Room Grid layout. Left side: Car preview (large). Right side: Dense, precise selection controls (buttons, toggles) using white/10 surfaces and pure white for active states. Tesla/Porsche configurator aesthetic.
sections_instructions.process_timeline: Vertical layout. A 1px wide white/20 line connecting steps. Small white dots for milestones. Luxury engineering aesthetic - precise and technical.
sections_instructions.asmr_video_block: Large cinematic container. Dark overlay. Subtle play button in the center. Hover reveals video or plays it.
sections_instructions.stats: Huge numbers (text-7xl or text-8xl). Use framer-motion useInView to trigger count-up animations. Strict monochrome palette.
sections_instructions.horizontal_gallery: Fullscreen horizontal scrolling section via Framer Motion useScroll and useTransform, or CSS snap scroll. Pure cinematic widescreen images of BMWs.
sections_instructions.contact_form: Minimalist inputs. Use border-bottom only (technical look) or fully glassmorphic inputs. No generic standard rounded borders. Include pure white hover/focus states.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure pure white text on black/dark-gray backgrounds meets APCA standards.
accessibility.data_testid: Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements.
